summary: A relaxed cultural loop through Paris and Lyon, favouring museums and markets over rushed sightseeing.

stops.name: Musée d'Orsay
stops.reason: Fits your interest in art without the Louvre's crowds.

stops.name: Marché des Enfants Rouges
stops.reason: Budget-friendly food stalls, good for a slow afternoon.

stops.name: Vieux Lyon
stops.reason: Walkable historic district matching your unhurried pace.
